response.justification: Candidate has deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent frameworks, PostgreSQL-equivalent SQL skills, and Kubernetes/Docker exposure — well above the entry-level bar. However, this is a Senior/Staff engineer applying to a Junior/Mid role, raising serious overqualification and retention risk, plus Berlin on-site presence with only basic German may be a friction point.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js + React fullstack background across multiple companies
Relevant infra exposure: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (CDK), CI/CD, microservices
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, clean architecture, teaching/workshops
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level IC role
Only basic German for a high on-site Berlin role in construction/energy domain
No demonstrated Nest.js or PostgreSQL specifically (MongoDB-heavy); renewable energy domain experience absent

key_factors.factor: Basic German for on-site Berlin role
